===''Pokémon the Series''===
[[File:Cheren anime.png|thumb|250px|Cheren in {{aniseries|BW}}]]
===={{aniseries|BW}}====
Cheren was mentioned by [[Professor Juniper]] in ''[[BW109|New Places... Familiar Faces!]]'', where she explained that he was a new [[Gym Leader]] located at [[Aspertia City]]. Cheren physically appeared in ''[[BW111|There's a New Gym Leader in Town!]]''. {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} met him at the [[Aspertia Gym]], where they learned that he was also a teacher at the [[Pokémon academy|Trainers' School]], which was located at the [[Gym]]. When {{AP|Pikachu}} and {{TP|Iris|Axew}} accidentally caused loud noises on the School's PA, making all the School's Pokémon run wildly around, Ash, Iris, and Cilan helped Cheren to gather them.

Finally, only a {{p|Shinx}} was left. When it was too scared to come closer, Cheren went to it, and, ignoring its {{t|Electric}} shocks, managed to calm it down. Afterwards, Cheren agreed to have an unofficial {{pkmn|battle}} with Ash. Ash used his {{AP|Oshawott}}, while Cheren used his {{p|Herdier}}. Cheren eventually won the battle, with Herdier taking Oshawott out with a [[super effective]] {{m|Thunder Fang}}.

====Pokémon movies====
Cheren made a cameo appearance in the ending credits of ''[[M16|Genesect and the Legend Awakened]]''.

====Character====
Cheren is personable and calm, though he has a tendency to overthink.
